ddls:
CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "thread" TEXT /* Thread where the log entry was generated */,
  "level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., INFO, ERROR, DEBUG) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry */,
  "file_line" TEXT /* File and line number where the log entry was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application that generated the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log entry was generated */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the request or transaction that generated the log */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction if applicable */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the request */,
  "stack_trace" TEXT /* Stack trace information for error logs */,
  "correlation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier to correlate log entries across multiple systems or services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES log_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES log_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the application was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the severity level is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log file */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the log file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the log file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the log file */,
  "is_compressed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log file is compressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_files_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry involved in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the action request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES logs ("log_id")
)
